_comment: Source-currency registry (domain: ocps-schools). Watches the authoritative sources behind the OCPS school + program index (shared/schools/ocps/) so open/close + magnet/choice program changes are caught between refreshes. tools/source_currency.py classifies each source's freshness; standards/program changes stay ADVISORY + human-verified. FLDOE MSID is canonical for the school list/status; OCPS School Choice for programs.
authority_note: FLDOE MSID is authoritative for the FL school list + open/closed status; OCPS School Choice is authoritative for magnet/choice programs. Confirm any open/close or program change on these PRIMARY sources before updating the index.
